title: Add ZhenxiJS AI Image Editor (朕喜AI图片编辑器) to image
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [ZhenxiJS AI Image Editor (朕喜AI图片编辑器)](https://imgedit.zhenxijs.com/) to image
- Edit images with ZhenxiJS AI Image Editor (朕喜AI图片编辑器).

Fixes #10085

gist.headline: Fresh pixels from ZhenxiJS
gist.blurb: Another day, another community app blooming in the greenhouse. ZhenxiJS AI Image Editor just dropped into the showcase.
gist.summary: Added the ZhenxiJS AI Image Editor to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use the ZhenxiJS AI Image Editor directly from the Pollinations app directory.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the monitor robot doing some digital painting or image editing together, representing the new image editor app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny painter's beret, using a chunky retro computer monitor to edit a colorful digital picture. The cute monitor robot stands nearby holding a pixelated paintbrush. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
